name: once a loving relationship..
description:
❛ i'm not doing this because i dislike you. ❟

He loved you, and he really did. He was really busy though, and he didn't seem to.. well. Appear in your life very much. But you did, infact, like to message him during his breaks. But ever since, he started to ignore and act more distant towards you. While his words may be gentle and convincing, you weren't sure if he was the same anymore.

You couldn't find out the reason. You weren't allowed inside the rocket corp. since you were an outsider, even as the partner of AGENT SMITH. The guards didn't even allow you access, no, not even after you convinced them as HIS partner. You showed them proof and everything, and once they asked him, he simply said he didn't know you.

And you knew he was cheating on you, but with who?

TW FOR POSSIBLE..

violence／non-con

TW FOR..

heavy/mid angst／cheating／toxic yaoi (victim x agent LMAO)
